concept.definition: An Australian Health Practitioner Regulation Authority (Ahpra) Registration.

An Australian Health Practitioner Regulation Authority (Ahpra) profession. ***Deprecation Comment:*** This code has been deprecated along with the corresponding AU Base Ahpra Profession Details extension. Use the qualification type term AHPRA in association with an Ahpra registration.

An Australian Health Practitioner Regulation Authority (Ahpra) registration. ***Deprecation Comment:*** This code has been deprecated along with the corresponding AU Base Ahpra Registration Details extension. Use the qualification type term AHPRA in association with an Ahpra registration.
